description: Master structural map of the sovereign registry architecture for Beast System 3.0. Defines registry object types, anchoring logic, badge systems, audit trails, and cross‑layer linkages.

identity_registry.purpose: Anchors sovereign, executive, stewardship, and participant identities to immutable registry entries.

badge_registry.purpose: Stores badge definitions, issuance events, credential metadata, and chapter/ambassador certifications.

chapter_registry.purpose: Defines chapters, ministries, task forces, and their operational authority.

rules: must map to a valid identity anchor
authority must be traceable to Ring 0
no chapter may exceed foundational authority

document_registry.purpose: Anchors federal filings, governance documents, SOPs, and doctrinal texts.

audit_registry.purpose: Maintains immutable audit trails for all registry events.

rules: all registry entries must reference a root anchor
all entries must be logged in registry-log.json
all logs must be indexed in registry-index.json
all indexes must be chained in registry-chain.json
no entry may be deleted or overwritten

federal_context.author: Pat Tarwater Jr.
federal_context.notes: Registry Layer is part of the federal record and must remain immutable.
